title: Blue and gold flowing section divider
implementation_notes: Use as a decorative full-width divider. CSS: width:100%; height:auto; pointer-events:none; aria-hidden=true.

title: Bottom-left wheat corner flourish
purpose: Decorative corners on cards, hero panels, proposal sections, or footer blocks.
implementation_notes: Position absolute bottom-left; keep opacity 0.7–1.0 depending on background. Do not mirror unless design needs matching right-corner pair.

title: Soft flour-dust watercolor wash
purpose: Behind headlines, CTA areas, product intro blocks, or empty-space depth.
implementation_notes: Set behind text with z-index below content. Recommended opacity: 0.45–0.75; never place over body copy.

title: Four wheat sprig variants sheet
purpose: Crop individual sprigs for small brand accents, cards, dividers, and empty-state details.
implementation_notes: 2x2 grid; crop each quadrant as needed. Keep linework small and subtle.

title: 12-icon bakery/utility grid
purpose: Reference sheet for the full matched icon family.
implementation_notes: 4 columns x 3 rows. Use individual icon files for production UI; this grid is for overview/reference.

title: Wheat stalk icon
implementation_notes: Duotone wheat-gold/brown. Use at 24–96px depending on section. Treat as decorative unless used as an interactive control.

title: Sourdough loaf icon
implementation_notes: Duotone wheat-gold/brown. Use at 24–96px depending on section. Treat as decorative unless used as an interactive control.

title: Cookie icon
implementation_notes: Duotone wheat-gold/brown. Use at 24–96px depending on section. Treat as decorative unless used as an interactive control.

title: Swirled dough / bagel icon
implementation_notes: Duotone wheat-gold/brown. Use at 24–96px depending on section. Treat as decorative unless used as an interactive control.

implementation_notes: Duotone wheat-gold/brown. Use at 24–96px depending on section. Treat as decorative unless used as an interactive control.

implementation_notes: Duotone wheat-gold/brown. Use at 24–96px depending on section. Treat as decorative unless used as an interactive control.

title: Gift box icon
implementation_notes: Duotone wheat-gold/brown. Use at 24–96px depending on section. Treat as decorative unless used as an interactive control.

title: Wall clock icon
implementation_notes: Cropped from original 12-icon grid because no separate image-generator export was produced for this icon. Keep in the same visual family.

title: Chef's whisk icon
implementation_notes: Cropped from original 12-icon grid because no separate image-generator export was produced for this icon. Keep in the same visual family.

title: Sourdough product placeholder — primary
purpose: Coming-soon or missing product photo placeholder for square cards.
implementation_notes: Use inside product photo cards when a real baked-good image is missing. Prefer primary; alternate is available if a tiny coastal-blue accent is desired.

title: Sourdough product placeholder — alternate blue accent
purpose: Coming-soon or missing product photo placeholder for square cards.
implementation_notes: Use inside product photo cards when a real baked-good image is missing. Prefer primary; alternate is available if a tiny coastal-blue accent is desired.
